name: Maintenance Report

labels: maintenance
assignees: ''
---

## Maintenance Task Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task needed.

## Task Type
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security updates
- [ ] Technical debt
- [ ] Other (specify below)

## Current Situation
Describe the current state and why this maintenance is needed.

## Proposed Changes
Describe the changes you propose to make.

## Expected Outcome
What should be the result after completing this maintenance task?

## Impact Assessment
- **Complexity**: [Low/Medium/High]
- **Risk Level**: [Low/Medium/High]
- **Estimated Effort**: [e.g., 2 hours, 1 day, 1 week]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the maintenance task here.
